problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: TenderGraph Zero-Hallucination, Evidence-Anchored Evaluation Engine for Government Procurement
summary: Design a technical platform that can understand tenders, evaluate eligibility, and produce explainable evaluation reports for government procurement.
key_steps: Secure data extraction from messy bidder documents within an air-gapped sandbox
Mathematical evaluation of the extracted data against tender's rules
Auditability through 'Sniper-Highlight UI' and Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) review dashboard
optimization_claims: Fast, explainable, and legally defensible process
constraints_addressed: Data privacy concerns due to cloud APIs
